description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 27, 2024 at 6:21 PM PT, a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California, was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Barneveld Avenue at Jerrold Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling north on Barneveld Avenue and came to a stop at the 3-way stop sign controlled intersection of Jerrold 
Avenue, when a passenger car approached the Waymo AV from behind. The front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage. 
Print
Clear Form
